name: wireshark
description: Install Cygwin from a prebuilt cygwin64.tgz, run postinstall, add to PATH, and verify.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$bin='C:\cygwin64\bin'; $bash=Join-Path $bin 'bash.exe'; $log=Join-Path $env:ProgramData 'MAST\logs\cygwin-verify.log'; if (Test-Path $bash) { & $bash -lc 'uname -a' | Out-File -FilePath $log -Encoding UTF8; & $bash -lc 'cygcheck -V' | Out-File -FilePath $log -Append -Encoding UTF8; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $env:ProgramData 'MAST\logs\cygwin-smoke.txt') -Value 'cygwin_ok' } else { 'bash.exe not found' | Out-File -FilePath $log -Encoding UTF8 }"
